name: gap-reference-assistant
description: Syntax highlighting, documented symbol highlighting, and hover reference text for GAP.

gapReference.gapInstallationPath.description: Absolute path to the local GAP installation directory. The reference manual is expected under doc/ref inside this directory unless gapReference.manualPath is set.

gapReference.manualPath.description: Optional absolute path to the GAP reference manual HTML directory. Leave empty to use gapReference.gapInstallationPath + doc/ref.

gapReference.hover.maxEntries.description: Maximum number of overload/reference entries to show in one hover.

gapReference.hover.maxDescriptionLength.description: Maximum description length per hover entry before truncation.

gapReference.hover.wrapColumn.description: Column at which hover signatures and documentation paragraphs are hard-wrapped.

gapReference.hover.maxExamples.description: Maximum number of GAP example blocks to show in one hover entry.

gapReference.hover.maxExampleLines.description: Maximum number of lines to show from each GAP example block.

gapReference.semanticHighlighting.enable.description: Highlight documented GAP reference symbols using VS Code semantic tokens.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-parser.js && node scripts/test-analyzer.js && node scripts/test-lsp-server.js && node scripts/test-lsp-client.js && node scripts/test-extension-helpers.js
